title: headlamp-plugin: Spawn Windows .cmd shims via cmd.exe
author: skoeva

findings.description: Commit subject missing SubArea: 'headlamp-plugin: bin: Spawn Windows .cmd shims via cmd.exe' would be more precise.
viaCmd() helper is clean, well-documented with JSDoc, and a transparent no-op on non-Windows platforms.
Uses cmd.exe /d /s /c (Node.js-recommended) rather than shell: true, correctly avoiding DEP0190 deprecation.
All call sites comprehensively updated: npm link (x2), npm view, runScriptOnPackages loop, i18next path, and npx --prefix.
